title: veronica scardica subsp. africana
intro: Veronica scardica subsp. africana, also known as African speedwell or Veronica africana, is a subspecies of the Veronica scardica plant, a perennial herb belonging to the Plantaginaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Veronica scardica subsp. africana include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
